en: Or I could stand and ask him the question that if I didn't ask would haunt me the rest of my life
ko: 아니면 그 질문을 하고 서 있을 수도 있어. 내가 묻지 않으면 평생 후회할 질문.

en: I thought by the time I got here, I'd know what to say
ko: 여기 도착할 때쯤엔 뭐라고 말해야 할지 알 줄 알았어.

en: Well, you're late parties over I'll say it is
Anyway, I was just on my way home
ko: 어쨌든, 나는 방금 집에 가는 길이었어.

en: I have a question for you
Really need to hear you say it
ko: 네가 그 말을 하는 걸 정말 듣고 싶어.

en: I don't know it just got so hard and she's
